# uapi_openvpn_instance (Data Source)

Look up the openvpn instance.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uapi_openvpn_instance" "example" {
  id = "<id>"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Resource id to look up.

### Read-Only

- `auth` (String) uci option auth.
- `ca` (String) uci option ca.
- `cert` (String) uci option cert.
- `cipher` (String) uci option cipher.
- `client` (Boolean) uci option client.
